'''zhachozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squalliness|squalliness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squalliness|squalliness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhachozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæchezheth|zhæchezheth]] || [[word:zhæchezhej|zhæchezhej]] || [[word:zhæchezhesh|zhæchezhesh]] || [[word:zhæchezhe|zhæchezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhachochozhoth|zhachochozhoth]] || [[word:zhachochozhoj|zhachochozhoj]] || [[word:zhachochozhosh|zhachochozhosh]] || [[word:zhachochozho|zhachochozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhachozhoth|zhachozhoth]] || [[word:zhachozhoj|zhachozhoj]] || [[word:zhachozhosh|zhachozhosh]] || [[word:zhachozho|zhachozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhachofzhoth|zhachofzhoth]] || [[word:zhachofzhoj|zhachofzhoj]] || [[word:zhachofzhosh|zhachofzhosh]] || [[word:zhachofzhof|zhachofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhachozhotho|zhachozhotho]] || [[word:zhachozhojo|zhachozhojo]] || [[word:zhachozhosho|zhachozhosho]] || [[word:zhachozhoko|zhachozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhachozhoth|zhachozhoth]] || [[word:zhachozhoj|zhachozhoj]] || [[word:zhachozhosh|zhachozhosh]] || [[word:zhachozho|zhachozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhachozhothol|zhachozhothol]] || [[word:zhachozhojol|zhachozhojol]] || [[word:zhachozhoshol|zhachozhoshol]] || [[word:zhachozhokol|zhachozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhachozhothotho|zhachozhothotho]] || [[word:zhachozhojojo|zhachozhojojo]] || [[word:zhachozhoshosho|zhachozhoshosho]] || [[word:zhachozhoko|zhachozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhachozhothon|zhachozhothon]] || [[word:zhachozhojon|zhachozhojon]] || [[word:zhachozhoshon|zhachozhoshon]] || [[word:zhachozhokon|zhachozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhachozhothoro|zhachozhothoro]] || [[word:zhachozhojoro|zhachozhojoro]] || [[word:zhachozhoshoro|zhachozhoshoro]] || [[word:zhachozhokoro|zhachozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
